title: WESEARY Wireless 2.4GHz Gaming Headset for PS5, PS4, Mac, Switch, Mobile, Gaming Headphones with Crystal-Clear ENC Mic, Bluetooth 5.4, Ultra-Low Latency, Stereo Bluetooth Headset for PC
features: 🏆 【Dual-Mode Wireless Gaming Headset: Lag-Free Gaming & Audio】Experience ultimate freedom with this gaming headset pc. The 2.4GHz dongle delivers a competitive edge with ultra-low latency (≤20ms) for PS5, PS4, PC, Switch, and mobile gaming. As a bluetooth gaming headset, it seamlessly pairs with your Switch and mobile devices, making this versatile gaming headset for ps5 your all-in-one audio solution.

🎤 【Crystal-Clear Chat with ENC Microphone】Communicate with precision using this advanced wireless headset with microphone. Its 360° rotatable ENC mic effectively cancels background noise while ensuring your voice is transmitted with crystal clarity. With a convenient one-touch mute button, you maintain complete control over your communications during intense gameplay.

😌 【All-Day Comfort in a Lightweight Headset】Engineered for marathon sessions, this usb headset with microphone features a lightweight, adjustable headband and breathable protein leather earmuffs. The design evenly distributes pressure to prevent fatigue and overheating, delivering lasting comfort that lets you focus entirely on your game.

🔋 【Marathon 45-Hour Battery Life】Never be interrupted by a low battery. This powerful pc headset with microphone provides up to 45 hours of continuous playtime (35 hours with LED lights on). A quick 2-hour USB-C charge ensures your gaming headset is always ready for action, keeping you in the game longer.

✨ 【Immersive 3D Stereo Sound Experience】Immerse yourself in rich, high-fidelity 3D stereo sound. The high-precision drivers in this bluetooth headset help you pinpoint critical audio cues like footsteps and reloads, giving you a tangible advantage in competitive games and a deeply engaging experience across all genres.

🌈 【Portable Folding Design & Dynamic LED】Take your audio anywhere with the space-saving, foldable design of this wireless headset. When in use, the dynamic LED lighting enhances your gaming atmosphere, creating a more immersive and visually engaging setup that complements your style.

🎁 【The Perfect Gaming Headset Wireless as a Gift】This feature-packed wireless gaming headset makes an ideal gift for any gamer. Whether for Christmas, birthdays, or other celebrations, it's designed to elevate the gaming experience for boys, girls, and all gaming enthusiasts—making it a thoughtful and impressive present.
